allow: PowerShell($userPath = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH", "User"\); Write-Output "=== Current User PATH ==="; $userPath -split ';' | Where-Object { $_ -ne "" })

PowerShell($rawUserPath = \(Get-ItemProperty -Path 'HKCU:\\Environment' -Name Path\).Path; Write-Output "=== RAW User PATH \(registry, REG_EXPAND_SZ\) ==="; Write-Output $rawUserPath; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== Length: $\($rawUserPath.Length\) ===")

PowerShell(Test-Path "C:\\Users\\박광민\\Desktop\\온라인수익화"; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\박광민\\Desktop\\온라인수익화" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Extension -in '.exe', '.bat', '.cmd', '.ps1' } | Select-Object Name | Select-Object -First 5)

PowerShell($f = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude.json"; if \(Test-Path $f\) { $j = Get-Content $f -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output "=== pluginUserConfig / mcp related keys ==="; $j.PSObject.Properties.Name | Where-Object { $_ -match "plugin|mcp|korean|config" } } else { Write-Output "no .claude.json" })

PowerShell($raw = Get-Content "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude.json" -Raw; foreach \($kw in @\("LAW_OC","korean-law","api_key","userConfig","pluginConfig"\)\) { $found = $raw -match [regex]::Escape\($kw\); Write-Output "$kw : $found" }; Write-Output "=== mcpServers content ==="; \($raw | ConvertFrom-Json\).mcpServers | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5)

PowerShell($raw = Get-Content "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude.json" -Raw; $j = $raw | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output "=== top-level keys ==="; $j.PSObject.Properties.Name; Write-Output "=== cachedDynamicConfigs ==="; $j.cachedDynamicConfigs | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6)

PowerShell($p = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess | Select-Object -First 1; if \($p\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force; "Stopped PID $p \(port 3000\)" } else { "No listener on 3000" })

PowerShell($p = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess | Select-Object -First 1; if \($p\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force; "Stopped PID $p" } else { "no listener" })

PowerShell(npx next lint --file app/page.tsx --file "app/tournaments/[id]/page.tsx" --file "app/tournaments/[id]/[categoryId]/page.tsx" --file "app/tournaments/[id]/[categoryId]/[eventId]/page.tsx" --file "app/tournaments/[id]/rankings/page.tsx" --file components/public/ranking-table.tsx --file components/overall-rankings-view.tsx --file components/public/rank-medal.tsx --file components/public/status-badge.tsx 2>&1)

PowerShell(npx eslint app/page.tsx "app/tournaments/[id]/page.tsx" "app/tournaments/[id]/[categoryId]/page.tsx" "app/tournaments/[id]/[categoryId]/[eventId]/page.tsx" "app/tournaments/[id]/rankings/page.tsx" components/public/ranking-table.tsx components/overall-rankings-view.tsx components/public/rank-medal.tsx components/public/status-badge.tsx 2>&1)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Force -Filter ".env*" | Select-Object Name; npx next lint 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 30)

PowerShell(node scripts/contrast-audit.mjs > $null 2>&1; "contrast exit=$LASTEXITCODE"; npx next build 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "Compiled successfully|Failed to compile|Type error|error TS" | Select-Object -First 10)

PowerShell(node scripts/contrast-audit.mjs > $null 2>&1; "contrast exit=$LASTEXITCODE"; npx next build 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "Compiled successfully|Failed to compile|Type error|error TS|Error:" | Select-Object -First 12)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://localhost:3000/tournaments/2/rankings; "status=$\($r.StatusCode\)"; $c=$r.Content; foreach\($s in @\('종별 종합','종합집계','종목별 메달현황','집계 준비 중','<table','overflow-x-auto'\)\){ "{0,-22}: {1}" -f $s, \([regex]::Matches\($c,[regex]::Escape\($s\)\)\).Count })
